comment: Roundups allowed to be INDEXED (robots index,follow + sitemap). WS5 Option A: 12 monthlies + 9 regional-season survivors picked 2026-07-23 by rule: coherent region AND >=20 races. 'International' catch-alls stay noindex (weak unique intent, cannibalize monthlies); thin regionals (<20 races) stay noindex until the catalog fills them. Tier roundups not offered. Consumed by generate_season_roundup.py and generate_sitemap.py.
